{% if files %} {% for file in files %} {% set assoc_count = file.subtitle_count + file.sidecar_count %} {{ file.filename }} {{ file.size_display }} {% if assoc_count > 0 %} +{{ assoc_count }} {% endif %} {% if eviction_enabled %} {{ file.priority_score }} {% endif %} {% if file.is_ondeck %} OnDeck {% endif %} {% if file.is_watchlist %} Watchlist {% endif %} {% if not file.is_ondeck and not file.is_watchlist %} {% if file.source == 'ondeck' %} Stale OnDeck {% elif file.source == 'watchlist' %} Stale Watchlist {% else %} Other {% endif %} {% endif %} {% if file.users %} {% for user in file.users %} {{ user }} {% endfor %} {% else %} - {% endif %} {{ file.cache_age_hours|round(1) }}h {% if file.associated_files %} {% for af in file.associated_files %} ↳ {{ af.filename }} {{ af.size }} {% endfor %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% else %} No cached items{% if source_filter != 'all' or search %} matching filters{% endif %} {% endif %} {% if files %}
{{ totals.total_files }} items {{ totals.total_size_display }} total OnDeck {{ totals.ondeck_count }} Watchlist {{ totals.watchlist_count }} {% if totals.other_count > 0 %} Other {{ totals.other_count }} {% endif %}
{% endif %}
